title: Arunachal Pradesh
description: Source: TOI Subject: Mapping Context: India has officially rejected China’s latest attempt to rename places in Arunachal Pradesh, labeling it a mischievous attempt to manufacture baseless narratives. About Arunachal Pradesh: What is the Controversy? The primary dispute stems from China’s refusal to recognize India’s sovereignty over Arunachal Pradesh.
